expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜面板的尺寸。[Width], [Height], [Depth] 为总尺寸， [BoardThick] 为顶部、底部及侧面板材厚度，[BackBoardThick] 为背景板材厚度。 (AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah, dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดกระดานของตู้ [Width], [Height],[Depth] เป็นขนาดทั้งหมด, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของกระดานบน, ล่างและด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของกระดานหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height],[Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày của chất liệu bảng trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày của chất liệu bảng nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang laki ng mga panel para sa cabinet. Ang [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang sukat, [BoardThick] ang kapal ng materyal ng pataas, pababa, at gilid na panel, [BackBoardThick] ang kapal ng materyal ng background panel. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ပိုးဇီနယကိုအကေါ်တွင်ရှိသည် [Width], [Height],[Depth] သည်စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာချက်ဖြစ်ကာ, [BoardThick] သည် တိုင်, ထိညွှတ် တို့ရဲ့ ထူထပ်မှုကို (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាទំហំបន្ទះសម្រាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជា វិមាត្រតម្លើង, [BoardThick] គឺជា កម្រាស់សម្ភារៈបន្ទះលើ, បាត និងចំហៀង, [BackBoardThick] គឺជា កម្រាស់សម្ភារៈបន្ទះខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄູນປະເມີນຂະໜາດຂອງແຜ່ນສໍາລັບຕູ້ [Width], [Height],[Depth] ເປັນຂະໜາດໂລກສົມບູນ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມຫນາຂອງຂັ້ນ, ສູງ, ແລະຂອງຂ້າງ, [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນ ຄວາມຫນາຂອງທີ່ເປັນຂອງຫນ້າຫລັງ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットのパネルサイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth] は全体のサイズを表し、[BoardThick] は上部、下部、側面パネルの厚さを表し、[BackBoardThick] は背景パネルの厚さを表します。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 패널 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 전체 치수를 나타내며, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 패널 재료의 두께를 나타내고, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 패널 재료의 두께를 나타냅니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de los paneles para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] son medidas totales, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material del panel superior, inferior y lateral, y [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material del panel trasero. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des panneaux pour une armoire. [Width], [Height], [Depth] correspondent à la mesure totale, [BoardThick] correspond à l'épaisseur du matériau des panneaux supérieur, inférieur et latéraux, [BackBoardThick] correspond à l'épaisseur du matériau du panneau arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattenmaße für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height],[Depth] sind die Gesamtabmessungen, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platte, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Rückwandplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: एक कैबिनेट के लिए पैनल के आकार की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप हैं, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] बैकग्राउंड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Рассчитывает размеры панелей для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] - это общие размеры, [BoardThick] - это толщина материала для верхней, нижней и боковой панелей, [BackBoardThick] - это толщина материала для задней панели. (AI translated, please check)
